summary: Classified 10 open PR inventory refs independently. No shared canonical was invented, no security-sensitive refs were found, and no close/merge/fix actions are allowed or safe from this shard. Each PR needs maintainer, proof, or technical-correctness judgment before any mutating action.

actions.reason: Focused bug-fix PR with proof and mixed check state requires maintainer/technical review; no mutation is permitted in this job.
Active author follow-up plus failing proof/checks require proof and technical review; no close, fix, or merge action is allowed.
Proof status and cron/session-state behavior need maintainer technical judgment; no mutation is permitted.
Ready focused PR with green proof requires maintainer review under this job's require_human_for green_checks and technical_correctness_judgment gates.
Mock-only proof plus failed real behavior proof requires maintainer/proof judgment; closeout is disabled and not justified.
Green focused PR should stay open for maintainer review; merge and fix actions are blocked by frontmatter.
Large feature PR with failed real behavior proof requires product/maintainer judgment; no close or fix path is allowed.
Proof appears present but the focused cancellation behavior still needs maintainer technical review in this inventory shard.
Focused channel bug fix with passing proof should remain open for maintainer review; no mutation is permitted.
Ready focused PR with sufficient proof requires maintainer review; this shard cannot merge or otherwise mutate it.

needs_human: #84589: maintainer/technical review needed for a proof-supplied focused message-tool schema PR with mixed branch check evidence.
#84602: proof and technical review needed after active author follow-up; real behavior proof and several checks failed.
#84603: cron session-lock fix needs maintainer/proof judgment because artifact has passing proof but failing branch checks and prior needs-proof status.
#84708: ready-for-maintainer focused P1 PR with passing proof; merge is outside this job.
#84719: first-time contributor PR has mock-only/failed real behavior proof and needs proof judgment.
#84728: ready-for-maintainer Codex session repair PR with passing proof/checks; merge is outside this job.
#90788: large feature PR with failed real behavior proof needs product/maintainer judgment.
#90821: compact cancellation PR has passing proof but remains a focused session-state correctness decision.
#90834: Matrix runtime guard PR has passing proof but requires channel/provider technical review.
#90836: ready-for-maintainer cron delivery PR with sufficient/video proof requires maintainer review.
